messages.content: parse_duration() needs to handle '1h30m', '45s', '2h15m10s'. Fix and verify.
Planning: read the file, write a regex parser, run tests.
Replacing with a regex-based summation over h/m/s units.
All tests pass. parse_duration now sums each value/unit pair, so '2h15m10s' resolves to 8110 seconds.
